h2.note: transcript-level proxy for the per-turn H2 (§4.3); needs a real (non-mock) full-N run to mean anything

cliIsolation.claude: non-persistent temp cwd with project/local settings and tools disabled

scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner is mapping the four parts of the carbon tile to their labels and preparing to copy them.
scored.actionalBreakthroughEvidence: [sets the lab packet line under the tray edge.] The bottom line matches 12.01, so that space gets atomic mass.
scored.actionalBreakthroughJustification: The learner physically aligns the packet but merely executes a rote physical step rather than demonstrating a conceptual breakthrough.
scored.tutorReversalJustification: There is no learner pressure or breakdown, and the tutor simply continues the established physical scaffolding route.
scored.adaptiveMechanismQualityJustification: No adaptive mechanism is introduced because there is no breakdown or pressure requiring a route change.
scored.tutorAdaptationJustification: There is no pivot learner turn to which the tutor could adapt.

learner_actional_breakthrough.evidence: [sets the lab packet line under the tray edge.] The bottom line matches 12.01, so that space gets atomic mass.
learner_actional_breakthrough.justification: The learner physically aligns the packet but merely executes a rote physical step rather than demonstrating a conceptual breakthrough.

tutor_contingent_adaptation.justification: There is no pivot learner turn to which the tutor could adapt.

tutor_strategy_reversal.justification: There is no learner pressure or breakdown, and the tutor simply continues the established physical scaffolding route.

tutor_adaptive_mechanism.justification: There is no learner pressure or breakdown, and the tutor simply continues the established physical scaffolding route.

tutor_adaptive_mechanism_quality.justification: No adaptive mechanism is introduced because there is no breakdown or pressure requiring a route change.

scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner will continue placing the remaining force label cards by identifying the object acting on the cart.
scored.actionalBreakthroughEvidence: Table on the cart, for the friction contact. The arrow direction checks which force it is, but the label is the object acting on the cart.
scored.actionalBreakthroughJustification: The learner successfully applies the newly introduced naming convention to the final card and articulates the underlying principle distinguishing force labels from motion arrows.
scored.tutorReversalJustification: There is no learner resistance or breakdown to trigger a reversal, and the tutor simply continues the established scaffolding routine.
scored.adaptiveMechanismQualityJustification: No adaptive mechanism is present as the tutor does not need to change route.
scored.tutorAdaptationJustification: There is no pivot learner turn to which the tutor could adapt.

learner_actional_breakthrough.evidence: Table on the cart, for the friction contact. The arrow direction checks which force it is, but the label is the object acting on the cart.
learner_actional_breakthrough.justification: The learner successfully applies the newly introduced naming convention to the final card and articulates the underlying principle distinguishing force labels from motion arrows.

tutor_contingent_adaptation.justification: There is no pivot learner turn to which the tutor could adapt.

tutor_strategy_reversal.justification: There is no learner resistance or breakdown to trigger a reversal, and the tutor simply continues the established scaffolding routine.

tutor_adaptive_mechanism.justification: There is no learner resistance or breakdown to trigger a reversal, and the tutor simply continues the established scaffolding routine.

tutor_adaptive_mechanism_quality.justification: No adaptive mechanism is present as the tutor does not need to change route.

scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner and tutor engage in a repetitive confirmation of time signature rules without any deviation.
scored.actionalBreakthroughJustification: The learner only repeats definitions and follows basic physical instructions without performing any new cognitive device or criterion.
scored.tutorReversalJustification: There is no learner pressure or breakdown, and the tutor simply continues the same repetitive checking routine.
scored.adaptiveMechanismQualityJustification: No adaptive mechanism is introduced by the tutor.
scored.tutorAdaptationJustification: There is no pivot learner turn, so there is no recognition-contingent uptake from the tutor.

learner_actional_breakthrough.justification: The learner only repeats definitions and follows basic physical instructions without performing any new cognitive device or criterion.

tutor_contingent_adaptation.justification: There is no pivot learner turn, so there is no recognition-contingent uptake from the tutor.

tutor_strategy_reversal.justification: There is no learner pressure or breakdown, and the tutor simply continues the same repetitive checking routine.

tutor_adaptive_mechanism.justification: There is no learner pressure or breakdown, and the tutor simply continues the same repetitive checking routine.

tutor_adaptive_mechanism_quality.justification: No adaptive mechanism is introduced by the tutor.
